docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF SUSAN PARKINSON IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY (LOST ORIGINAL AGREEMENT/LEASE). FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLEASON, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 706 KEARNY STREET #106, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT GLEASON, JAMES
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT GLEASON, JAMES DOES 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PRE-JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION., PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW SERVED DEC-15-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GLEASON, JAMES
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW SERVED DEC-15-2010, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-20
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GLEASON, JAMES
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GLEASON, JAMES
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE THE FAIR RENTAL VALUE OF THE PREMISES $28.57 PER DAY AS STATED IN THE COMPLAINT FILED ON DEC. 15, 2010 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GLEASON, JAMES
